body:
Subject: Transwestern CA Capacity - Deal Transfer Review

Hey Michelle,

Got two deals in the hopper that need a capacity check on the TW CA book before our Nov 25 commercial review. Can you pull together a quick snapshot of what's available on the delivery side?

Let me know if you need deal numbers or anything else to run the numbers. Deadline's tight so appreciate you getting this to me whenever you can.

Thanks!
Sandra

Hey Sandra,

Got it - happy to pull the delivery capacity snapshot for the TW CA book. I'll get you a current available capacity figure for both deals before the 25th.

Go ahead and send over the deal numbers whenever you've got them, and I'll run the numbers against our current throughput and capacity constraints. Should have the snapshot back to you by EOD Thursday if that works on your timeline.

Let me know,
Michelle

Hey Michelle,

Deal numbers are:

- ENA 1240985
- ENA 1241012

Both are on the TW CA delivery swing, so let me know if you need any additional deal parameters. Thursday EOD works perfectly on my end.

Thanks for the quick turnaround!
Sandra

Got both deals - ENA 1240985 and ENA 1241012 are in my queue. I'll run them against the current TW CA delivery capacity figures and get you a full snapshot by Thursday EOD as discussed.

If I hit any snags with the throughput numbers or need to loop in someone on the interconnect side, I'll flag it to you before end of day tomorrow.

Michelle
